summary: Medical Malpractice insurance covering healthcare providers (hospitals, NHS trusts, GPs, consultants) for clinical negligence claims. UK market closely linked to NHS Resolution (CNST/LTPS) and CQC regulatory framework. Claims-made basis with long tail exposure.

schemaEntities.description: Healthcare provider entity. Custom: ProviderType, CQC_Registration, GMC_SpecialtyCode, NHSOrganisationCode, AnnualPatientContacts, SpecialtyMixScore, NHSResolutionMember, Indemnity_Scheme, PrivatePracticeRatio, LocumCoverage, LitigationHistory, MedRegulatoryBody.

108 rules: CQC registration validity, GMC specialty risk loading, NHS Resolution scheme alignment, retroactive date continuity, LocumCoverage sub-limit adequacy, high-risk specialty exclusion triggers (obstetrics, neurosurgery).
Clinical specialty entity. Custom: SpecialtyCode, RiskGrade, ProcedureCount, HighRiskProcedureFlag, SpecialtyLimit, CrownIndemnityFlag.

relationships.note: Coverage limit driven by specialty mix, patient contacts, and NHS Resolution scheme -- 12 custom fields
Multi-specialty schedule with individual risk grades -- no direct GW Cloud equivalent
CQC registration and NHS Resolution scheme rules are hard underwriting stops

migrationIssues.detail: CQC registration validation required at bind. No GW Cloud native CQC integration -- new regulatory API connector required.
NHS Resolution CNST/LTPS scheme membership affects coverage terms and premium. GW Cloud has no NHS Resolution integration -- custom scheme management entity required.
Multi-specialty risk grading and procedure count-based loading. Custom Gosu risk scoring -- GW Cloud rating rules can accommodate with significant configuration.
Claims-made basis with long run-off tail (obstetrics 25+ years). GW Cloud claims-made policy support available -- run-off premium calculation requires custom implementation.

cloudMapping.action: CQC provider register API integration required
NHS Resolution scheme entity requires new GW Cloud design
Clinical specialty schedule entity -- new GW Cloud design required
Generic specialty code -- GMC specialty-specific risk grade table migration required
